text: 11a (AA8a) Primary Reason for Assessment CHAR 2 The primary reason for completing the assessment using the categories of assessment types mandated by Federal regulation. 00 = None of the above, 01 = Admission Assessment (required by day 14), 02 = Annual Assessment, 03 = Significant change in status assessment, 04 = Significant correction of prior full assessment, 05 = Quarterly review assessment, 06 = Discharged - return not anticipated, 07 = Discharged - return anticipated, 08 = Discharged
